fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Transfer-from Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location that items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-from Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the sender at the location that the items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-from Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the sender at the location that the items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-from Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the location that the items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-from Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the address of the location that items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-from Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the location that the items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-from City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the location that the items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location that the items are transferred to.

fields.name: Transfer-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the recipient at the location that the items are transferred to.

fields.name: Transfer-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the recipient at the location that the items are transferred to.

fields.name: Transfer-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the location that the items are transferred to.

fields.name: Transfer-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the address of the location that the items are transferred to.

fields.name: Transfer-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the location that the items are transferred to.

fields.name: Transfer-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the location that items are transferred to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the transfer order.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that you expect the transfer-to location to receive the shipment.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the transfer order is open or has been released for warehouse handling.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: In-Transit Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the in-transit code for the transfer order, such as a shipping agent.

fields.name: Transfer-from Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the location that the items are transferred from.

fields.name: Transfer-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the location that items are transferred to.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.

fields.name: Shipping Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how long it takes from when the items are shipped from the warehouse to when they are delivered.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction that the document represents, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transport method, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Partner VAT ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the counter party's VAT number.

fields.name: Entry/Exit Point
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of either the port of entry at which the items passed into your country/region, or the port of exit.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip: Specifies the area of the customer or vendor, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip: Specifies a specification of the document's transaction, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Direct Transfer
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the transfer does not use an in-transit location. When you transfer directly, the Qty. to Receive field will be locked with the same value as the quantity to ship.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies an instruction to the warehouse that ships the items, for example, that it is acceptable to do partial shipment.

fields.name: Outbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula for the time it takes to get items ready to ship from this location. The time element is used in the calculation of the delivery date as follows: Shipment Date + Outbound Warehouse Handling Time = Planned Shipment Date + Shipping Time = Planned Delivery Date.

fields.name: Inbound Whse. Handling Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time it takes to make items part of available inventory, after the items have been posted as received.

fields.name: Assigned User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who is responsible for the document.
